title: SI Refined Obsidian
description: New obsidian building blocks and an obsidian armor trim.
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting Banner](https://i.imgur.com/bIJz4CP.png)](https://www.soncresity.industries/kinetic-hosting/)

# 🌐 SI: Refined Obsidian

> New obsidian building blocks and an obsidian armor trim.

***

## ✨ Overview

SI: Refiend Obsidian adds brand new building blocks crafted from obsidian, effectively making obsidian its own full stone type. It also adds an entirely new trim material called

***

## 🔧 Features

### [Building Blocks](https://iki.soncresity.industries/siro/blocks/)

SI: Refined Obsidian adds a lot of building blocks, resembling the deepslate set. That means that it adds a cobbled, polished, bricks and tiles variant, all as stairs, slabs, walls and full blocks. It also adds a chiseled obsidian block.

### [Armor Trim Material](https://iki.soncresity.industries/siro/trim-material/)

The new armor trim material, obsidian dust, can be used for any armor trim like any other trim material. It resembles the colors ob obsidian.

***

## 📦 Requirements

*   Minecraft 1.21.1
*   SI: Essentials
*   NeoForge

***
